summary: Stream 3 Enhancement — Multi-actor timesheet validation workflow fully tested. 14/14 backend tests pass. Frontend had 1 critical JS bug (actionIcon undefined) which was fixed. All 3 sub-tabs (Valideur N+1, Chef de Projet, PMO/Admin) now functional.

ui_bugs.issue: FIXED: `actionIcon={actionIcon}` used undefined variable — should be `actionIcon={ActionIcon}` (destructured alias). Caused 'actionIcon is not defined' ReferenceError crashing validation tab entirely.

critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: actionIcon variable name bug in ValidationSubView (line 504 of Timesheets.jsx). The prop was destructured as `ActionIcon` but referenced as `actionIcon` in GroupCard render — classic JS case-sensitivity bug.
seed_data_creation: Tests consumed some timesheets (validate/reject actions run). DB state modified by tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stream 3 fully tested and working. Backend: validation views (valideur/cp/pmo), pending-count, validate (N+1→cp_reviewed, CP→validated, PMO bypass), reject (→draft, 422 without reason). Frontend: Timesheets page with 3 tabs (Ma saisie, Validation, Rapports), Validation has 3 sub-tabs (Valideur N+1 / Chef de Projet / PMO Admin), all showing correct grouped timesheets. ResourceModal has validator_resource_id dropdown (data-testid=resource-form-validator). Fixed critical JS bug: actionIcon undefined in ValidationSubView.
rca_of_the_issue: In ValidationSubView component, the `actionIcon` prop is destructured with an alias `actionIcon: ActionIcon` (to follow React convention of PascalCase for components). But on line 504, `actionIcon={actionIcon}` was passed to GroupCard using the original lowercase name `actionIcon` which was not in scope — only `ActionIcon` was. Fix: changed to `actionIcon={ActionIcon}`.
